name: AgTech Global International, Inc.
summary: AgTech Global International, Inc. operates as an agricultural supplier. Its proprietary systems and processes use resources, such as water, energy, space, capital, and labor delivering necessary fertilizers and nutrients to specialized growing industries with focus on hemp. It markets a range of non-organic and organic non-GMO fertilizers, nutrients, pesticides, insecticides, herbicides, and mold treatment products via its Website, retail, and wholesale channels, as well as offers patented DRIP irrigation product for indoor and outdoor applications. The company distributes its products in the United States and internationally. AgTech Global International, Inc. is based in Irvine, California.
